activation_rule: Bootstrap may stage; live activation remains owner-driven and approval-gated.

steps.action: verify OS, identity, disk, Python, PowerShell, Git, Codex Desktop, native-host compatibility, and repository integrity
stage global and workspace rule exports
stage workflow, member, rule, maintenance, and owner source
stage user-owned Codex helper tools and validate their runtime prerequisites
compare templates with target config; never overwrite wholesale
import the sanitized CC Switch semantic export through its owner, then reapply provider catalog and model projection
reacquire enabled plugin versions from inventory; platform, bundled, and plugin skills are not restored from user-skill files
restore profile definitions and regenerate route projections
read the single MCP recovery manifest, resolve platform/authorization boundaries, and require an archive or owner reacquisition/reconnect receipt for every required implementation
verify content-addressed bundle hashes and safe archive members; materialize only into the isolated stage and never run package installation during restore
run isolated MCP initialize/tools/list and representative read-only tools/call smoke for each executable local bundle; remote/plugin/private assets require their owner receipts
restore active user-owned .codex and compatibility .agents skills with required text and binary dependencies, then run lifecycle validation
import current native memory text, semantic memory exports, and the manifest-selected current checkpoint snapshot; raw databases and full checkpoint history only through compatible owner import
recreate approved scheduled tasks and shortcuts from structured specifications
verify encrypted archive receipts and restore only owner-supported state
run verification matrix and emit snapshot-linked restore receipt
